/usr/bin/ar qc libATEmulation.a CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/acia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/acia6850.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/crtc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/ctc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/diskutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/eeprom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/flash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/phone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/riot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/rtcds1305.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/rtcmcp7951x.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/rtcv3021.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/scsi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATEmulation.dir/source/via.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libATEmulation.a
